signals.raw:
Magic Beat Mavericks 138-127 Despite Cooper Flagg's Historic 51 Points | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Orlando Magic defeated the Dallas Mavericks on Friday night, overcoming rookie Cooper Flagg's franchise-record 51 points (19/30 FG, 6/9 3PT) to extend Dallas's home losing streak to 14 games[1]. Wendell Carter Jr. led Magic with 28 points; they remain half-game behind 8th-place Charlotte in the East,
